message:
fix(typing): move hooks before early return to comply with Rules of Hooks

The TypingAnimation component was violating React's Rules of Hooks by
calling useState and useReducedMotion hooks after a conditional early
return. This would cause React to fail when the words array is empty.

Changes:
- Move all hooks (useState x3, useReducedMotion) to top of component
- Add hasWords variable to safely check for empty words array
- Add hasWords to useEffect dependency array
- Move early return to after all hooks are called
- Add guard in useEffect to skip animation when hasWords is false

Fixes eslint react-hooks/rules-of-hooks errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
